email.confirmation_body_line1: We have received your message and thank you for contacting us. It is a pleasure to read you.
email.confirmation_body_line2: Every question, every thought is a light on the path. We will take the necessary time to bring you a response filled with clarity.
email.response_subject: A response is waiting for you
email.response_body_line1: A response to your message has been carefully woven and is waiting for you in your personal space.
email.response_body_line2: We invite you to log in to discover it.
